examples: 'I suppose you're right,' she said resignedly.
Tom replied resignedly, "The King hath said it."
Somewhat after one in the afternoon, Tom resignedly underwent the ordeal of being dressed for dinner.
Though many Europeans have doubts, they look at enlargement resignedly, as an American show.
"There's a set of people who are intrinsic oppositionists to everything Google does, " Mr. Schmidt acknowledges resignedly.
